content: Selling fully weaponized PoC for CVE-2026-11882 (Microsoft Word). FUD 0/64. Bypasses Windows Defender. 2 BTC.
I dumped a list of 400 vulnerable Cisco VPN endpoints (CVE-2026-9999). Easy initial access for ransomware crews.
We have successfully weaponized the Apache Struts bug. Targeting example-corp.com systems tonight. Who has access to their internal Jenkins?
